title: AI Policy
description: Establish an AI policy appropriate to the organization's purpose, providing a framework for setting AI objectives

title: Roles and responsibilities for AI
description: Define and communicate roles and responsibilities for AI system development, deployment, and monitoring

title: AI system inventory
description: Establish and maintain an inventory of AI systems developed, deployed, or used by the organization

title: Resources for AI systems
description: Determine and provide resources needed for AI system lifecycle management

title: Competence of workers involved in AI
description: Ensure persons working on AI systems are competent on the basis of appropriate education, training, or experience

title: Awareness for AI stakeholders
description: Ensure relevant stakeholders are aware of the AI policy, their contribution, and implications of non-conformance

title: Communication about AI
description: Determine internal and external communications relevant to the AI management system

title: AI risk assessment
description: Assess risks associated with AI systems including potential harms to individuals, groups, and society

title: AI system impact assessment
description: Conduct impact assessments for AI systems, considering fundamental rights and societal impacts

title: Documenting AI risk treatment
description: Document risk treatment decisions, including acceptance criteria and residual risk

title: Objectives of AI systems
description: Define objectives for AI systems consistent with organizational AI policy and applicable requirements

title: Requirements for AI systems
description: Determine requirements for AI systems considering intended purpose, legal, and ethical aspects

title: Design and development planning
description: Plan the design and development of AI systems, including architecture, data requirements, and validation

title: Testing of AI systems
description: Test AI systems against defined requirements including performance, safety, bias, and robustness

title: Deployment of AI systems
description: Establish procedures for AI system deployment including approval, monitoring setup, and rollback

title: Operations and monitoring
description: Monitor AI systems during operation for performance degradation, drift, and incidents

title: Third party and customer relationships
description: Manage relationships with third parties providing or receiving AI systems or components

title: Documentation requirements
description: Maintain documentation for AI systems including design decisions, data sources, and test results

title: Responsible AI use
description: Ensure AI systems are not used for prohibited practices and comply with ethical requirements

title: Third party AI components
description: Assess and manage risks from third-party AI components, models, and data

title: Data quality for AI
description: Establish data quality criteria and processes for AI training, validation, and testing data

title: Data provenance
description: Document and track the origin, transformations, and lineage of data used in AI systems

title: Data preparation
description: Establish processes for data collection, labeling, cleaning, and augmentation

title: Data for testing AI
description: Ensure test data is representative, unbiased, and sufficient for evaluating AI system performance

title: Information about AI systems
description: Provide relevant information about AI systems to interested parties (users, affected persons, authorities)

title: Communication about AI interaction
description: Inform users when they are interacting with an AI system (transparency obligation)

title: Reporting to interested parties
description: Establish reporting mechanisms for AI system performance, incidents, and compliance status

title: Instructions for human intervention
description: Provide clear instructions for human oversight and intervention in AI system operation

title: AI system monitoring
description: Monitor AI systems for conformance with requirements and performance objectives

title: Responsibilities for AI use
description: Assign responsibilities for the use, monitoring, and oversight of AI systems

title: Procedures for human override
description: Establish procedures for human override of AI system decisions, including escalation and suspension

title: Terms with third parties
description: Establish terms and conditions with third parties for AI system provision, data sharing, and compliance

title: Monitoring third party AI services
description: Monitor third-party AI services for compliance, performance, and security

title: Customer handling of AI outputs
description: Provide guidance to customers on handling AI system outputs, including limitations and appropriate use
